title: Polydactyly applies SPD plus four and Hit plus two

plan.title: Polydactyly applies SPD plus four and Hit plus two
plan.summary: Equip Polydactyly to a primary creature and verify the printed SPD and Hit bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Polydactyly.

steps: Player 1 plays Polydactyly and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect the hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Polydactyly remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective SPD and battle hit output.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
